stemHtml: The QNH is by definition the value of the…

options.a: atmospheric pressure at the sea level of the location for which it is given.
options.b: atmospheric pressure at the level of the ground overflown by the aircraft.
options.c: altimeter setting so that the altimeter, on the apron of the aerodrome for which it is given, reads the elevation.
options.d: altimeter setting so that the altimeter, on the apron of the aerodrome for which it is given, reads zero.
